HomePage.title: Think Global, Act Jeddah
HomePage.subtitle: A community of driven young leaders shaping the future of Jeddah through innovation, collaboration, and grassroots action.
HomePage.aboutHub: The Jeddah Shapers are a group of young change-makers committed to driving positive impact in their community through projects in education, wellbeing, sustainability, and more. As part of the Global Shapers Community — an initiative of the World Economic Forum — we bring together passionate youth to lead grassroots solutions and connect with global peers to shape a better future.

project1.title: Rise Up
project1.description: Mentoring small businesses with limited resources to achieve sustainable growth through expert guidance.

project2.title: Anti-Bullying Campaign
project2.description: Creating spaces where youth feel heard, understood, and accepted — encouraging empathy and kindness.

project3.title: Mindfulness for Peace
project3.description: Empowering youth with mindfulness tools to build resilience, reduce stress, and foster inner peace.

AboutPage.title: Who We Are
AboutPage.description: A network of young people under 30 working together to address local, regional, and global challenges — born out of the World Economic Forum, rooted in Jeddah.
AboutPage.shapersSubtitle: Driven leaders from diverse backgrounds — entrepreneurs, doctors, engineers, artists, and more.
AboutPage.wefDesc: The Global Shapers Community is a World Economic Forum initiative connecting young people whose ideas and actions drive positive change. With 500+ hubs worldwide, we are part of a vibrant global movement.
AboutPage.ctaDesc: Join a community of driven young leaders shaping the future of Jeddah.
AboutPage.missionGlobalBody: Part of the WEF Global Shapers Community with 10,000+ members across 500+ cities.
AboutPage.missionLocalBody: Grassroots projects tackling real challenges in education, wellbeing, and sustainability.
AboutPage.missionYouthBody: Change-makers under 30 leading initiatives that create measurable community impact.
AboutPage.missionDialogueBody: Bridging local realities with global frameworks for lasting, meaningful change.
AboutPage.timelineSubtitle: Key milestones that shaped who we are
AboutPage.milestone1Body: Jeddah Hub established as part of the Global Shapers Community network.
AboutPage.milestone2Body: Launch of our first community project — setting the tone for action-driven impact.
AboutPage.milestone3Body: Expanded reach through digital programs during global disruption, growing our community resilience.
AboutPage.milestone4Body: Co-organized a regional summit welcoming 180 delegates from 12 Arab cities.
AboutPage.milestone5Body: Hosting the first-ever cross-hub cultural retreat, uniting Shapers from across the Kingdom and the world.

BecomeShaperPage.title: Become a Shaper
BecomeShaperPage.subtitle: Join a new generation of young leaders shaping the future of Jeddah — one initiative at a time.
BecomeShaperPage.whoBody: Global Shapers are driven young people between the ages of 18 and 30 who are committed to creating positive change in their cities. Our members come from all walks of life — engineers, educators, entrepreneurs, creatives — united by a shared passion for meaningful impact. Membership is entirely voluntary and requires roughly 10 hours of engagement per week.
BecomeShaperPage.ctaBody: Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. Take the first step today.
BecomeShaperPage.ctaNote: You will be redirected to the official World Economic Forum application portal.
criteria1: Based in or connected to Jeddah
Strong communication skills in English or Arabic
criteria2: Clear alignment with the hub's mission and values
A proactive mindset with the drive to take ownership
Collaborative spirit and commitment to the team
A demonstrated history of impact — big or small
criteria3: Participate in regular hub meetings and community events
Actively contribute to at least one project or initiative
Represent the hub in local and international dialogues
Expand your skills through real-world collaboration

steps.title: Apply
steps.body: Submit your application with your background, interests, and motivation to join. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis throughout the year.

steps.title: Screening
steps.body: Our team reviews applications in two main cycles. We may reach out with follow-up questions.

steps.title: Interview
steps.body: Shortlisted candidates are invited for a conversation with hub members to explore alignment and fit.

steps.title: Welcome
steps.body: Successful applicants join as Guest Shapers — a collaborative trial period before full membership.

BecomeShaperPage.drivenSubtitle: Driven young people creating positive change.
BecomeShaperPage.valuesSubtitle: What joining the hub really means
BecomeShaperPage.value1Body: Regular in-person meetings, workshops, and social events to connect, ideate, and grow together.
BecomeShaperPage.value2Body: Access to the WEF Global Shapers network — 10,000+ members across 500+ cities worldwide.
BecomeShaperPage.value3Body: Lead or contribute to active initiatives that create measurable impact in Jeddah.
BecomeShaperPage.value4Body: Hands-on experience in project management, advocacy, communications, and leadership.
BecomeShaperPage.voicesSubtitle: What members say about the experience
BecomeShaperPage.quote1: Joining Jeddah Hub connected me to people who share my belief that young people can lead real change. The projects we work on aren't just ideas — they're real.
BecomeShaperPage.quote2: I came in wanting to do something meaningful. I stayed because of the community. Being a Shaper has pushed me to think bigger and act bolder.
BecomeShaperPage.quote3: The hub gave me the tools, the network, and the encouragement to turn my ideas into real impact. Every initiative taught me something I couldn't learn in a classroom.
